nodes.label: Agenda / Timeline Screen — Full Top View
nodes.description: Full-screen Agenda view (not Home tab). Date header 'HOY, DOM 3 MAY — Agenda' with badge '10 items · 1 sin hora'. Coach Mentex section with two actionable cards: (1) 'Ventana de enfoque · 16:00' — 90 min free window with 'Reservar bloque' / 'Ahora no' actions; (2) 'Cierre reflexivo · 21:30' — 5 min reflection with 'Activar' / 'Saltar hoy' actions. Below: 'TIMELINE DEL DÍA' section showing '7 CALENDAR · 3 RECORDATORIOS', Google Calendar sync status, and a vertical timeline with time-blocked events: 7:30am Meditar 5min (Recordatorio, checked), 9:00am Daily standup (Reunión), 10:30am Sesión de diseño (Reunión, 1h30min), 12:30pm Café con María (Personal), 1:30pm Almuerzo+caminata (Pausa), 3:00pm Review Backend API (partial).

coach_cards.title: Ventana de enfoque
coach_cards.description: 90 min libres entre el review y el gym. Trabajo profundo.

coach_cards.title: Cierre reflexivo
coach_cards.description: 5 minutos para reflexionar sobre tu jornada antes de desconectarte.

nodes.label: Coach Mentex Actionable Cards — Agenda Screen
nodes.description: Two proactive AI coaching cards displayed at top of Agenda screen. 'Ventana de enfoque · 16:00' detects a free 90-min window and offers to schedule a focus block. 'Cierre reflexivo · 21:30' prompts an end-of-day reflection routine. Both cards have binary action pairs (accept/dismiss). Pattern: Coach Mentex scans calendar and surfaces contextual suggestions.

nodes.label: Timeline del Día — Calendar + Reminders Section
nodes.description: Vertical timeline section on Agenda screen. Shows time-blocked events pulled from Google Calendar (sync indicator: green dot + 'sincronizado' + Desconectar button). Events tagged by category (Recordatorio, Reunión, Personal, Pausa). Completed items show checkmark. Layout: left time column, vertical line divider, right event content with tag chips and Google Calendar avatar.

edges.note: Coach cards are sub-components at top of Agenda screen
Timeline section is a sub-component of Agenda screen
Both are Coach Mentex AI coaching card patterns; same AI coach entity, different screen contexts
